description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, tactical design with a predominantly black body accented by orange highlights and markings. It is equipped with a large cylindrical magazine mounted on the side, suggesting a high-capacity or energy-based ammunition system. The rifle includes a scope mounted on the top rail for precision aiming, and the stock is robust and ergonomically shaped for shoulder support. The barrel is encased within the main body, with a short protrusion at the muzzle, and the overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer materials. The grip and trigger assembly are integrated into the lower section, with visible mechanical and electronic components. The rifle's design is sleek and modern, likely intended for advanced urban combat scenarios.
description: A sleek, futuristic black rifle with orange accents, featuring a large side-mounted cylindrical magazine, a scope, and a robust ergonomic stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical magazine on the left and the compact muzzle, with the scope and top rail visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, the large cylindrical magazine, scope, and detailed orange accents.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock, grip, and the back of the cylindrical magazine, with the scope's rear lens visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, stock, and the rifle's mechanical details, with orange highlights along the body.
